changeSet.author: migration-team
changeSet.comment:
Add unique constraint on (funding_value_id, contributor_type, name) in pafs_core_funding_contributors. Removes duplicate rows (keeping the highest id) then adds the constraint so the application can use a single Prisma upsert instead of findFirst + create/update.
All three columns are nullable; PostgreSQL treats each NULL as distinct for unique-constraint purposes, so legacy rows with NULL values are not affected.
The single-column index on funding_value_id is dropped because the new compound unique index covers it as a left-prefix.
